title: Configuration Work Item
outOfScope: Project Profile, Guard, quality command, or CI approval itself
Blocking the template-maintenance repository when no adopter Runtime Verification exists

sources.reason: Adoption requires Configure before governed development.
Existing readiness states and evidence fields.
Work Item creation entrypoint where the configuration gate belongs.

riskAssessment.reason: The gate is a deterministic local check keyed only by adopter Runtime Verification and the reserved configure task.

executionDecision.reason: User authorized the serial remediation plan and full lifecycle operations.

preReviewWarnings: Review adopter-only activation, configure-task exception, missing evidence, and fail-closed messages.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: An adopter with Runtime Verification evidence cannot start ordinary governed development before configure_ai_cockpit is complete.
configure_ai_cockpit remains startable, while repositories without adopter evidence and the template repository remain unaffected.
Focused tests cover missing, not_ready, ready, and configure-task exception states with fail-closed output.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.
Configuration Required must fail closed when adopter evidence says readiness is not ready.

intent.problem: Adoption intentionally leaves project quality and readiness unconfigured, but ai-start currently allows ordinary Work Items to begin immediately; this bypasses the required configure_ai_cockpit stage.
constraints: Activate the gate only when adopter Runtime Verification evidence exists.
Allow configure_ai_cockpit itself to start so the blocking state can be resolved.
Keep the template-maintenance repository and repositories without adoption evidence unaffected.
Use fail-closed, deterministic messages without inspecting or approving project boundaries.
intent.rationale: The reserved Configuration Work Item must be the explicit transition from installed adoption to governed development.

rawUserRequest: 先走完当前文档的流程。用户已授权按计划逐工单执行，包含修改代码、测试、文档、PR、合并、ai-close-work-item、分支清理；妄想测试失败继续修改。

declaredIntent.summary: Enforce the adoption-to-configuration Work Item transition.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: missing Runtime Verification leaves template and non-adopter repositories unaffected
adopter not_ready blocks ordinary Work Item start
configure_ai_cockpit remains startable while adoption is not ready
production-ready evidence permits ordinary Work Item start

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized governance code, tests, documentation, PR, merge, archive, close, and branch cleanup.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
